expectations.text: Distinguishes the deleted-page-still-served problem from the contradiction/versioning problem
expectations.evidence: Explicitly separates 'phantom context (deletion-propagation)' from 'contradictory answers (versioning + ranking)'.

expectations.text: Provides a freshness policy with a maxAge/TTL and a stale action per source
expectations.evidence: ContextDomain freshness block with per-source maxAge and staleAction flag/re-sync/block overrides.

expectations.text: States the principle of never serving expired content silently (explicit staleness or fail-closed)
expectations.evidence: 'never serve past-expired context, and only serve stale context with explicit staleness metadata'; high-stakes paths use block.

expectations.text: Describes a reconciliation / sweep / continuous-monitoring mechanism to purge or re-sync
expectations.evidence: syncMode: reconcile + trackDeletes; diff source IDs vs vector store and hard-delete orphans; sourceHealth checks.

expectations.text: Names discrete freshness states (e.g. fresh / stale / expired / conflicted)
expectations.evidence: Uses staleAction VALUES (flag/re-sync/block) and the words stale/expired, but does not enumerate the four named freshness STATES (fresh/stale/expired/conflicted).
